violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Coke cooler at grill found with food temperature of 58F and is set at the coldest setting. *Hot dogs, brats and cheese moved to walk in cooler while on-site. Defrosting cooler to see if it will recover to hold at 41F or less.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -No thermometer in coke cooler used for cold hold at grill.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of cups on the floor near the ice machine. -Case of toilet paper on the floor in the utility sink room.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Temporary hand wash station used at frill has a water basin with a push button, is not a free flow set-up.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Black debris at upper edge and at bottom edge of interior panel of the ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Black debris and limescale build up at back edges of bar 4 comp sink -Debris at bottom interior of green utensil container. -Some splatter at interior surfaces of microwave.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Linens and paper towels stored below wire chemical shelf in the utility room.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Placed ice bin equipment into hand sink basin during deep clean.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
